content: We can reframe state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures around an intrinsic curiosity-driven ICM (intrinsic curiosity module) sub-module that prioritizes retaining unexpected, uncertain new experiences over merely storing high-label-information examples. This creates a 'curiosity-aligned memory buffer' that automatically accumulates the most useful unlabeled data for active learning without manual acquisition scoring.
